query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of my findings on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding as of July 7, 2026:

## Key Findings

**No brand-new funding round was announced by any of the three specifically in June–July 2026.** The only *imminent/expected* round is Mistral's rumored raise.

### OpenAI
- **Latest closed round:** $122B committed capital at $852B post-money valuation, announced **March 31, 2026** (largest private fundraise in history). Backed by Amazon (~$50B anchor), Nvidia (~$30B), SoftBank, Microsoft.
- SoftBank separately completed a ~$41B investment (Dec 2025) for ~11% stake.
- **June–July 2026 activity = IPO prep**, not a new raise (confidential S-1 filing reported May 22/June 8; possible Q4 2026 debut).

### Anthropic
- **Latest closed round:** $65B Series H at $965B post-money valuation, announced **~May 28, 2026** — made it the world's most valuable AI startup, surpassing OpenAI. Likely its last private raise before IPO.
- Prior: $30B Series G at $380B valuation.
- **No new round in June–July 2026.**

### Mistral AI (the key imminent round)
- **The only active/expected new round:** Bloomberg reported **June 12, 2026** that Mistral was in **early talks to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B (~$23B) valuation** — nearly double its Sept 2025 Series C. As of early July 2026, **not confirmed closed**; terms could still change.
- Prior: €1.7B Series C at €11.7B (Sept 2025, led by ASML) + $830M bank debt (March 2026).

**Caveat on data vintage:** OpenAI's and Anthropic's rounds are confirmed/closed; Mistral's is rumored/in-talks only. Some per-investor allocations for OpenAI's round come from secondary outlets and aren't all officially confirmed.

Note: AskNews search was unavailable (credit limit reached), so findings rely on web search across CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, Forbes, company press releases, and financial trackers.

key_facts: OpenAI closed a $122 billion round at an $852 billion post-money valuation, announced March 31, 2026 — the largest private fundraise in history (up from a $110B figure reported in February 2026).
OpenAI's March 2026 round was backed by Amazon (reported ~$50B anchor), Nvidia (~$30B), SoftBank, and Microsoft, though not all per-investor amounts are officially confirmed.
SoftBank separately completed a ~$40–41 billion investment in OpenAI (announced April 2025, completed late December 2025) for roughly an 11% stake.

In June–July 2026, OpenAI's activity was IPO preparation (confidential S-1 filing reported May 22 and June 8, 2026; Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley leading; possible Q4 2026 debut), NOT a new private funding round.

Anthropic raised $65 billion in Series H at a $965 billion post-money valuation, announced ~May 28, 2026, co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia, Capital Group, Coatue, D1 Capital and others.
The Series H made Anthropic the world's most valuable AI startup, surpassing OpenAI, and was described as likely its last private raise before an IPO.
Anthropic's prior round was a $30 billion Series G at $380 billion post-money valuation (led by GIC and Coatue) earlier in 2026.
Mistral AI is the ONLY one of the three with an imminent/expected round: Bloomberg reported June 12, 2026 that it was in early talks to raise ~€3 billion (~$3.5B) at a ~€20 billion (~$23B) valuation.
Mistral's rumored €20B valuation would nearly double its September 2025 Series C valuation of €11.7B; as of early July 2026 the round had not been confirmed as closed.
Mistral's prior financing: €1.7B Series C at €11.7B post-money (September 2025, led by ASML with ~11% stake) and $830M bank debt financing (March 2026).
No brand-new funding round was announced by OpenAI, Anthropic, or Mistral specifically in June–July 2026; the only active/expected round is Mistral's rumored €3B raise.
